data_source: 10d simulation (trades_10d.csv, 965 trades) — bot offline Day 62.50, no live trades
avg_slippage: UNKNOWN — no live trades (bot offline Day 62.50)
noise_stop_problem: 87% early SL hits (<2h) in non-trending regimes [cached, last live session Apr 19 — 62.50d stale]

findings.finding: Trailing stop mean exit: +$8.86/trade (152 exits). TP2 mean: +$71.10/trade (145 exits). Gap: $62.24/trade = $9,460 foregone EV across 152 trailing exits in 10d sim.
findings.root_cause: Trailing stop activates at TP1 with near-breakeven floor. Reversal after TP1 catches trailing stop before meaningful extension toward TP2.
findings.proposed_fix: Lock 70% of TP1 gain as trailing floor in position_manager.py:_update_trailing_stop (line 1244-1251). Change `entry + fee_buffer` to `entry + (tp1-entry) * 0.70` for LONG; `entry - (entry-tp1) * 0.70` for SHORT.
findings.expected_impact: +$9,460 per 10d sim period (152 trades x $62.24 avg improvement)
findings.status: PENDING_CODE_CHANGE — requires paper trading validation before deploy

findings.finding: SL rate 38.3% (370/965 trades). Avg SL loss: -$224.63. Total SL drag: -$83,113 per 10d sim. System earns +$0.94/trade net — fragile margin, sensitive to WR drift.
findings.root_cause: SL hit rate may indicate too-tight stops relative to current market noise.
findings.proposed_fix: Monitor SL hit rate post-restart. If SL% > 40% over 50 live trades, increase ATR multiplier by 10%.

findings.finding: BTC SHORT 70-79% conf: -$91.87/trade, 98 trades. Rule btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 at gate=100% active. Needs live verification post-restart (times_applied=3, times_correct=0).
